<script>
    // ==========================================
    // TAB SWITCHING FUNCTIONALITY
    // ==========================================
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-item').forEach(tab => {
        tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (this.classList.contains('disabled')) return;
            const targetTab = this.getAttribute('data-tab');

            // Remove active class from all tabs
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-item').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));

            // Add active class to clicked tab
            this.classList.add('active');

            // Hide all tab contents
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(content => {
                content.classList.remove('active');
            });

            // Show target tab content
            document.getElementById('tab-' + targetTab).classList.add('active');
        });
    });

    // ==========================================
    // GENERAL SETTINGS - CUSTOM DURATION
    // ==========================================
    const btnCustom = document.getElementById('btn-custom');
    const customDurationContainer = document.getElementById('custom-duration-container');
    const btnApplyCustom = document.getElementById('btn-apply-custom');
    const durationButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.button-small[data-duration]');

    if (btnCustom) {
        btnCustom.addEventListener('click', function() {
            customDurationContainer.classList.toggle('visible');

            // Remove active state from all duration buttons
            durationButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('button-primary', 'duration-button'));

            // Toggle active state on custom button
            this.classList.toggle('button-primary');
            this.classList.toggle('duration-button');
        });
    }

    // Duration button clicks
    durationButtons.forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Remove active state from all buttons
            durationButtons.forEach(b => {
                b.classList.remove('button-primary', 'duration-button');
            });
            if (btnCustom) {
                btnCustom.classList.remove('button-primary', 'duration-button');
            }

            // Add active state to clicked button
            this.classList.add('button-primary', 'duration-button');

            // Hide custom duration container
            customDurationContainer.classList.remove('visible');
        });
    });

    // Apply custom duration
    if (btnApplyCustom) {
        btnApplyCustom.addEventListener('click', function() {
            const value = document.getElementById('custom-duration-value').value;
            const unit = document.getElementById('custom-duration-unit').value;

            if (value && value > 0) {
                // Custom duration applied
                // Add your logic here to handle the custom duration

                // Hide the custom duration container
                customDurationContainer.classList.remove('visible');
            }
        });
    }

    // ==========================================
    // DEPLOYMENT ENVIRONMENTS CONFIGURATION
    // ==========================================
    (function() {
        // ==========================================
        // PRIVATE SCOPE
        // ==========================================

        // Generate unique IDs
        const uid = () => `seg_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;

        // Private state - Start empty, will be populated by myop_init_interface
        let environmentsState = [];
        let productionEnvironment = null;
        let hasProductionEnabled = false;
        let configState = {};
        let pendingDeleteEnvironmentId = null;
        let hasChanges = false; // Track if any changes have been made
        let deletedEnvironments = []; // Track deleted environments with their data

        // DOM cache
        let elements = {};

        // ==========================================
        // PRIVATE HELPER FUNCTIONS
        // ==========================================

        function cacheElements() {
            elements = {
                segmentList: document.getElementById('segment-list'),
                btnAddSegment: document.getElementById('btn-add-segment'),
                btnSave: document.getElementById('btn-save'),
                btnCancel: document.getElementById('btn-cancel'),
                productionToggleCheckbox: document.getElementById('production-toggle-checkbox'),
                productionEnvironmentFields: document.getElementById('production-environment-fields'),
                productionNameInput: document.getElementById('production-name-input'),
                productionFunctionInput: document.getElementById('production-function-input'),
                productionDescriptionInput: document.getElementById('production-description-input'),
                deleteModalBackdrop: document.getElementById('delete-modal-backdrop'),
                deleteConfirmationInput: document.getElementById('delete-confirmation-input'),
                modalEnvName: document.getElementById('modal-env-name'),
                modalBtnDelete: document.getElementById('modal-btn-delete'),
                modalBtnCancel: document.getElementById('modal-btn-cancel'),
                modalClose: document.getElementById('modal-close')
            };
        }

        function nameToFunction(name) {
            if (!name) return '';

            const words = name
                .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\s-]/g, '')
                .split(/[\s-]+/)
                .filter(w => w.length > 0);

            if (words.length === 0) return '';

            const camelCase = words
                .map((word, index) => {
                    word = word.toLowerCase();
                    if (index === 0) return word;
                    return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1);
                })
                .join('');

            return camelCase;
        }

        function validateName(name) {
            if (!name) return false;
            if (name.trim().length < 2) return false;
            if (!/^[a-zA-Z]/.test(name)) return false;
            if (!/^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9\s-]*$/.test(name)) return false;
            return true;
        }

        function validateFunctionName(funcName) {
            if (!funcName) return false;
            if (!/^[a-zA-Z]/.test(funcName)) return false;
            if (!/^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$/.test(funcName)) return false;
            if (/\s/.test(funcName)) return false;
            return true;
        }

        function getValidationErrors() {
            const errors = [];
            const names = new Set();
            const functions = new Set();

            // Validate regular environments
            environmentsState.forEach((segment, index) => {
                if (!segment.name || segment.name.trim() === '') {
                    errors.push(`Environment ${index + 1}: Name is required`);
                }

                if (segment.name && segment.name.trim() !== '' && !validateName(segment.name)) {
                    errors.push(`Environment ${index + 1}: Invalid name "${segment.name}". Must start with a letter, be at least 2 characters long, and contain only letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens.`);
                }

                if (segment.name && names.has(segment.name.toLowerCase())) {
                    errors.push(`Environment ${index + 1}: Duplicate name "${segment.name}"`);
                } else if (segment.name) {
                    names.add(segment.name.toLowerCase());
                }

                if (!segment.identifier || segment.identifier.trim() === '') {
                    errors.push(`Environment ${index + 1}: Function identifier is required`);
                }

                if (segment.identifier && !validateFunctionName(segment.identifier)) {
                    errors.push(`Environment ${index + 1}: Invalid function identifier "${segment.identifier}". Must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.`);
                }

                if (segment.identifier && functions.has(segment.identifier.toLowerCase())) {
                    errors.push(`Environment ${index + 1}: Duplicate function identifier "${segment.identifier}"`);
                } else if (segment.identifier) {
                    functions.add(segment.identifier.toLowerCase());
                }
            });

            // Validate production environment if enabled
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                if (!productionEnvironment.name || productionEnvironment.name.trim() === '') {
                    errors.push(`Production Environment: Name is required`);
                }

                if (productionEnvironment.name && productionEnvironment.name.trim() !== '' && !validateName(productionEnvironment.name)) {
                    errors.push(`Production Environment: Invalid name "${productionEnvironment.name}".`);
                }

                if (productionEnvironment.name && names.has(productionEnvironment.name.toLowerCase())) {
                    errors.push(`Production Environment: Duplicate name "${productionEnvironment.name}"`);
                } else if (productionEnvironment.name) {
                    names.add(productionEnvironment.name.toLowerCase());
                }

                if (!productionEnvironment.identifier || productionEnvironment.identifier.trim() === '') {
                    errors.push(`Production Environment: Function identifier is required`);
                }

                if (productionEnvironment.identifier && !validateFunctionName(productionEnvironment.identifier)) {
                    errors.push(`Production Environment: Invalid function identifier "${productionEnvironment.identifier}".`);
                }

                if (productionEnvironment.identifier && functions.has(productionEnvironment.identifier.toLowerCase())) {
                    errors.push(`Production Environment: Duplicate function identifier "${productionEnvironment.identifier}"`);
                } else if (productionEnvironment.identifier) {
                    functions.add(productionEnvironment.identifier.toLowerCase());
                }
            }

            return errors;
        }

        function addEnvironment() {
            if (environmentsState.length >= 4) {
                return;
            }

            const newEnvironment = {
                id: uid(),
                name: '',
                description: '',
                identifier: '',
                isProduction: false,
                changeType: 'added' // Mark this environment as newly added
            };

            environmentsState.push(newEnvironment);
            hasChanges = true;  // Mark that we have changes

            renderEnvironments();
            updateSaveButtonState();

            // Merge production into environments array for notification
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });

            setTimeout(() => {
                const newCard = document.querySelector(`[data-segment-id="${newEnvironment.id}"]`);
                const nameInput = newCard?.querySelector('[data-field="name"]');
                if (nameInput) nameInput.focus();
            }, 0);
        }

        function handleProductionToggle(checked) {
            hasProductionEnabled = checked;
            hasChanges = true;  // Mark that we have changes

            if (checked && !productionEnvironment) {
                // Create production environment
                productionEnvironment = {
                    id: uid(),
                    name: 'Production',
                    description: 'Production Environment',
                    identifier: 'production',
                    identifierManuallyEdited: false,
                    isProduction: true,
                    changeType: 'added' // Mark as newly added
                };

                // Update form fields with default values
                elements.productionNameInput.value = productionEnvironment.name;
                elements.productionFunctionInput.value = productionEnvironment.identifier;
                elements.productionDescriptionInput.value = productionEnvironment.description;

                // Show fields container
                elements.productionEnvironmentFields.style.display = 'block';

                // Hide helper texts since fields are filled with valid default values
                setTimeout(() => {
                    elements.productionEnvironmentFields.querySelectorAll('.helper-text').forEach(helper => {
                        const field = helper.parentElement.querySelector('.form-input');
                        if (field && field.value.trim()) {
                            helper.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    });
                }, 0);

                // Focus on name field
                setTimeout(() => {
                    elements.productionNameInput.focus();
                }, 100);

            } else if (!checked) {
                // If production environment was saved, track it as deleted
                if (productionEnvironment && productionEnvironment.isSaved) {
                    deletedEnvironments.push({
                        ...productionEnvironment,
                        changeType: 'deleted'
                    });
                }

                // Clear production environment
                productionEnvironment = null;

                // Hide fields container
                elements.productionEnvironmentFields.style.display = 'none';

                // Clear inputs
                elements.productionNameInput.value = '';
                elements.productionFunctionInput.value = '';
                elements.productionDescriptionInput.value = '';
            }

            updateSaveButtonState();

            // Merge production into environments array for notification
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });
        }

        function removeEnvironment(id) {
            if (environmentsState.length <= 1 && !hasProductionEnabled) {
                notifyHost('validationError', {
                    message: 'At least one environment is required'
                });
                return;
            }

            const environment = environmentsState.find(s => s.id === id);
            if (environment) {
                // Check if this is a saved environment that needs host confirmation
                if (environment.isSaved) {
                    // Ask host for confirmation before deleting
                    notifyHost('requestDeleteEnvironment', {
                        id: id,
                        name: environment.name || 'Unnamed Environment',
                        isSaved: true
                    });
                    // Wait for host to call confirmDelete(id) if approved
                } else {
                    // Not saved yet, can delete immediately without confirmation
                    actuallyDeleteEnvironment(id);
                }
            }
        }

        function actuallyDeleteEnvironment(id) {
            const environment = environmentsState.find(s => s.id === id);
            if (!environment) return;

            // Remove from state and track as deleted
            environmentsState = environmentsState.filter(s => s.id !== id);
            hasChanges = true;  // Enable "Save Changes" button

            // Track deletion if it was previously saved
            if (environment.isSaved) {
                deletedEnvironments.push({
                    ...environment,
                    changeType: 'deleted'
                });
            }

            // Re-render and update button state
            renderEnvironments();
            updateSaveButtonState();

            // Notify host of the change
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });
        }

        function openDeleteModal(envName) {
            elements.modalEnvName.textContent = envName;
            elements.deleteConfirmationInput.value = '';
            elements.modalBtnDelete.disabled = true;
            elements.deleteModalBackdrop.classList.add('visible');

            setTimeout(() => {
                elements.deleteConfirmationInput.focus();
            }, 100);
        }

        function closeDeleteModal() {
            elements.deleteModalBackdrop.classList.remove('visible');
            pendingDeleteEnvironmentId = null;
            elements.deleteConfirmationInput.value = '';
            elements.modalBtnDelete.disabled = true;
        }

        function confirmDelete() {
            if (!pendingDeleteEnvironmentId) return;

            environmentsState = environmentsState.filter(s => s.id !== pendingDeleteEnvironmentId);
            closeDeleteModal();
            renderEnvironments();

            // Merge production into environments array for notification
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });
        }

        function handleDeleteConfirmationInput() {
            const inputValue = elements.deleteConfirmationInput.value.trim();
            elements.modalBtnDelete.disabled = inputValue !== 'DELETE';
        }

        function moveEnvironment(id, direction) {
            const index = environmentsState.findIndex(s => s.id === id);
            if (index === -1) return;

            const newIndex = index + direction;
            if (newIndex < 0 || newIndex >= environmentsState.length) return;

            const [movedEnvironment] = environmentsState.splice(index, 1);
            environmentsState.splice(newIndex, 0, movedEnvironment);

            renderEnvironments();

            // Merge production into environments array for notification
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });
        }

        function updateEnvironmentField(id, field, value) {
            const environment = environmentsState.find(s => s.id === id);
            if (!environment) return;

            environment[field] = value;
            hasChanges = true;  // Mark that we have changes

            // Mark environment as modified only if it's not already marked as added
            if (!environment.changeType || environment.changeType !== 'added') {
                environment.changeType = 'modified';
            }

            if (field === 'name' && !environment.identifierManuallyEdited && value.trim() !== '') {
                environment.identifier = nameToFunction(value);
            }

            if (field === 'identifier') {
                environment.identifierManuallyEdited = true;
            }

            renderEnvironments();
            updateSaveButtonState();

            // Merge production into environments array for notification
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });
        }

        function updateProductionField(field, value) {
            if (!productionEnvironment) return;

            productionEnvironment[field] = value;
            hasChanges = true;  // Mark that we have changes

            // Mark production environment as modified only if it's not already marked as added
            if (!productionEnvironment.changeType || productionEnvironment.changeType !== 'added') {
                productionEnvironment.changeType = 'modified';
            }

            if (field === 'name' && !productionEnvironment.identifierManuallyEdited && value.trim() !== '') {
                productionEnvironment.identifier = nameToFunction(value);
            }

            if (field === 'function') {
                productionEnvironment.identifierManuallyEdited = true;
            }

            renderEnvironments();
            updateSaveButtonState();

            // Merge production into environments array for notification
            const mergedEnvs = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                mergedEnvs.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            notifyHost('environmentChange', { environments: mergedEnvs });
        }

        function updateAddButton() {
            const isMaxReached = environmentsState.length >= 4;
            elements.btnAddSegment.disabled = isMaxReached;

            if (isMaxReached) {
                elements.btnAddSegment.title = 'Maximum of 4 environments reached';
            } else {
                elements.btnAddSegment.title = 'Add a new environment';
            }
        }

        function updateSaveButtonState() {
            if (elements.btnSave) {
                elements.btnSave.disabled = !hasChanges;
            }
        }

        function renderEnvironments() {
            let html = '';

            if (environmentsState.length === 0 && !hasProductionEnabled) {
                html = `
                    <div class="empty-state">
                        <div class="empty-state-text">No environments configured</div>
                        <div class="empty-state-subtext">Add your first environment to get started</div>
                    </div>
                `;
                elements.segmentList.innerHTML = html;
                updateAddButton();
                return;
            }

            // Render only regular environments (no production here anymore)
            html += environmentsState.map((segment, index) => {
                const hasMultiple = environmentsState.length > 1;
                const canMoveUp = index > 0;
                const canMoveDown = index < environmentsState.length - 1;
                const canDelete = environmentsState.length > 1 || hasProductionEnabled;

                return `
                    <div class="segment-card" data-segment-id="${segment.id}">
                        <div class="segment-header">
                            <div class="segment-header-left">
                                <span class="segment-index">Environment ${index + 1}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="segment-controls">
                                ${hasMultiple ? `
                                <button class="button-icon move"
                                        data-action="move-up"
                                        ${!canMoveUp ? 'disabled' : ''}
                                        title="Move up">
                                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                        <path d="M8 12V4M8 4L4 8M8 4L12 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </button>
                                <button class="button-icon move"
                                        data-action="move-down"
                                        ${!canMoveDown ? 'disabled' : ''}
                                        title="Move down">
                                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                        <path d="M8 4V12M8 12L12 8M8 12L4 8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </button>
                                ` : ''}
                                <button class="button-icon delete"
                                        data-action="delete"
                                        ${!canDelete ? 'disabled' : ''}
                                        title="Delete environment">
                                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                        <path d="M12 4L4 12M4 4L12 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="segment-body">
                            <div class="segment-fields">
                                <div class="segment-field">
                                    <label class="form-label form-label-required">Name</label>
                                    <input type="text"
                                           class="form-input"
                                           placeholder="e.g., QA, Staging"
                                           value="${segment.name}"
                                           data-field="name">
                                    <div class="error-message" data-error="name"></div>
                                    ${!segment.name ? '<div class="helper-text">⚠️ This field is required to save</div>' : ''}
                                </div>

                                <div class="segment-field">
                                    <label class="form-label form-label-required">Identifier</label>
                                    <input type="text"
                                           class="form-input"
                                           placeholder="e.g., qa"
                                           value="${segment.identifier}"
                                           data-field="identifier">
                                    <div class="error-message" data-error="identifier"></div>
                                    ${!segment.identifier ? '<div class="helper-text">⚠️ This field is required to save</div>' : ''}
                                </div>

                                <div class="segment-field segment-field-full">
                                    <label class="form-label">Description</label>
                                    <input type="text"
                                           class="form-input"
                                           placeholder="Describe this environment"
                                           value="${segment.description}"
                                           data-field="description">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');

            elements.segmentList.innerHTML = html;
            attachSegmentListeners();
            updateAddButton();
        }

        function attachSegmentListeners() {
            elements.segmentList.querySelectorAll('.segment-card').forEach(card => {
                const segmentId = card.dataset.segmentId;

                // Handle text input changes
                card.querySelectorAll('input[data-field]').forEach(input => {
                    input.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                        const field = e.target.dataset.field;
                        const isProduction = e.target.dataset.isProduction === 'true';
                        const cursorPosition = e.target.selectionStart;

                        if (isProduction) {
                            updateProductionField(field, e.target.value);
                        } else {
                            updateEnvironmentField(segmentId, field, e.target.value);
                        }

                        setTimeout(() => {
                            const newCard = document.querySelector(`[data-segment-id="${segmentId}"]`);
                            if (newCard) {
                                const newInput = newCard.querySelector(`[data-field="${field}"]`);
                                if (newInput) {
                                    newInput.focus();
                                    newInput.setSelectionRange(cursorPosition, cursorPosition);
                                }
                            }
                        }, 0);
                    });
                });

                // Handle button actions
                card.querySelectorAll('[data-action]').forEach(element => {
                    const action = element.dataset.action;

                    element.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        if (action === 'move-up') {
                            moveEnvironment(segmentId, -1);
                        } else if (action === 'move-down') {
                            moveEnvironment(segmentId, 1);
                        } else if (action === 'delete') {
                            removeEnvironment(segmentId);
                        }
                    });
                });
            });
        }

        function attachEventListeners() {
            elements.btnAddSegment.addEventListener('click', addEnvironment);
            elements.btnSave.addEventListener('click', handleSave);
            elements.btnCancel.addEventListener('click', handleCancel);

            if (elements.productionToggleCheckbox) {
                elements.productionToggleCheckbox.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                    handleProductionToggle(e.target.checked);
                });
            } else {
                console.error('Production toggle checkbox not found');
            }

            // Add listeners to production inputs
            if (elements.productionNameInput) {
                elements.productionNameInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                    updateProductionField('name', e.target.value);
                });
            }
            if (elements.productionFunctionInput) {
                elements.productionFunctionInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                    updateProductionField('identifier', e.target.value);
                });
            }
            if (elements.productionDescriptionInput) {
                elements.productionDescriptionInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                    updateProductionField('description', e.target.value);
                });
            }

            // Delete modal event listeners
            elements.deleteConfirmationInput.addEventListener('input', handleDeleteConfirmationInput);
            elements.modalBtnDelete.addEventListener('click', confirmDelete);
            elements.modalBtnCancel.addEventListener('click', closeDeleteModal);
            elements.modalClose.addEventListener('click', closeDeleteModal);
            elements.deleteModalBackdrop.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === elements.deleteModalBackdrop) {
                    closeDeleteModal();
                }
            });

            // Close modals on Escape key
            document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    if (elements.deleteModalBackdrop.classList.contains('visible')) {
                        closeDeleteModal();
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function handleSave() {
            const errors = getValidationErrors();

            if (errors.length > 0) {
                showValidationErrors(errors);
                notifyHost('validationError', {
                    message: errors[0]
                });
                return;
            }

            clearValidationErrors();

            // Merge non-production and production environments into single array
            const allEnvironments = [
                ...environmentsState.map((s, index) => ({
                    id: s.id,
                    name: s.name,
                    description: s.description,
                    identifier: s.identifier,
                    production: false,
                    order: index,
                    changeType: s.changeType || null
                }))
            ];

            // Add production environment if enabled
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                allEnvironments.push({
                    id: productionEnvironment.id,
                    name: productionEnvironment.name,
                    description: productionEnvironment.description,
                    identifier: productionEnvironment.identifier,
                    production: true,
                    order: allEnvironments.length,
                    changeType: productionEnvironment.changeType || null
                });
            }

            const output = {
                environments: allEnvironments,
                deletedEnvironments: deletedEnvironments.map(env => ({
                    id: env.id,
                    name: env.name,
                    description: env.description,
                    identifier: env.identifier,
                    production: env.production || false
                }))
            };

            // Note: hasChanges will be reset by host after successful save
            // The host will call myop_init_interface({ hasChanges: false }) after POST succeeds

            notifyHost('save', output);
        }

        function handleCancel() {
            notifyHost('cancel', {});
        }

        function showValidationErrors(errors) {
            clearValidationErrors();

            environmentsState.forEach((segment, index) => {
                const card = document.querySelector(`[data-segment-id="${segment.id}"]`);
                if (!card) return;

                const nameError = errors.find(e =>
                    e.includes(`Environment ${index + 1}`) &&
                    (e.includes('Name is required') || e.includes('Duplicate name') || e.includes('Invalid name'))
                );
                if (nameError) {
                    const nameInput = card.querySelector('[data-field="name"]');
                    const errorMsg = card.querySelector('[data-error="name"]');
                    const helperText = nameInput?.parentElement.querySelector('.helper-text');
                    if (nameInput && errorMsg) {
                        nameInput.classList.add('error');
                        errorMsg.textContent = nameError.split(': ')[1];
                        errorMsg.classList.add('visible');
                        if (helperText) helperText.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                }

                const functionError = errors.find(e =>
                    e.includes(`Environment ${index + 1}`) &&
                    (e.includes('Function identifier') || e.includes('Invalid function') || e.includes('Duplicate function'))
                );
                if (functionError) {
                    const functionInput = card.querySelector('[data-field="identifier"]');
                    const errorMsg = card.querySelector('[data-error="identifier"]');
                    const helperText = functionInput?.parentElement.querySelector('.helper-text');
                    if (functionInput && errorMsg) {
                        functionInput.classList.add('error');
                        errorMsg.textContent = functionError.split(': ')[1];
                        errorMsg.classList.add('visible');
                        if (helperText) helperText.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                }
            });

            // Show production environment errors
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                const prodCard = document.querySelector(`[data-segment-id="${productionEnvironment.id}"]`);
                if (prodCard) {
                    const nameError = errors.find(e => e.includes('Production Environment') && e.includes('Name'));
                    if (nameError) {
                        const nameInput = prodCard.querySelector('[data-field="name"]');
                        const errorMsg = prodCard.querySelector('[data-error="name"]');
                        const helperText = nameInput?.parentElement.querySelector('.helper-text');
                        if (nameInput && errorMsg) {
                            nameInput.classList.add('error');
                            errorMsg.textContent = nameError.split(': ')[1];
                            errorMsg.classList.add('visible');
                            if (helperText) helperText.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    }

                    const functionError = errors.find(e => e.includes('Production Environment') && e.includes('Function'));
                    if (functionError) {
                        const functionInput = prodCard.querySelector('[data-field="identifier"]');
                        const errorMsg = prodCard.querySelector('[data-error="identifier"]');
                        const helperText = functionInput?.parentElement.querySelector('.helper-text');
                        if (functionInput && errorMsg) {
                            functionInput.classList.add('error');
                            errorMsg.textContent = functionError.split(': ')[1];
                            errorMsg.classList.add('visible');
                            if (helperText) helperText.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function clearValidationErrors() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.form-input.error').forEach(input => {
                input.classList.remove('error');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.error-message.visible').forEach(msg => {
                msg.classList.remove('visible');
            });
            // Only show helper text for empty fields
            document.querySelectorAll('.helper-text').forEach(helper => {
                const field = helper.parentElement.querySelector('.form-input');
                if (field && !field.value.trim()) {
                    helper.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    helper.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        }

        function notifyHost(event, data) {
            if (window.myop_cta_handler) {
                window.myop_cta_handler(event, data);
            }
        }

        // ==========================================
        // PUBLIC API - Only 2 global functions
        // ==========================================

        /**
         * myop_init_interface - Host sends complete state to Component
         *
         * Always receives the same structure:
         *   {
         *     environments: [...],
         *     hasChanges: true/false,
         *     approvedDeletionId: 'xyz' (optional - signals host approved deletion)
         *   }
         */
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (arguments.length > 0) {
                // Handle approved deletion from host
                if (data.approvedDeletionId) {
                    actuallyDeleteEnvironment(data.approvedDeletionId);
                    return { success: true };
                }

                // Handle state update - environments array contains both regular and production envs
                if (data.environments !== undefined) {
                    // Split environments into production and non-production
                    const allEnvironments = data.environments || [];
                    const prodEnv = allEnvironments.find(env => env.production === true);
                    const nonProdEnvs = allEnvironments.filter(env => env.production !== true);

                    // Set non-production environments
                    environmentsState = nonProdEnvs.map(s => ({
                        ...s,
                        identifierManuallyEdited: false,
                        isSaved: true
                    }));

                    // Set production environment if exists
                    if (prodEnv) {
                        productionEnvironment = {
                            ...prodEnv,
                            identifierManuallyEdited: false,
                            isProduction: true,
                            isSaved: true
                        };
                        hasProductionEnabled = true;
                    } else {
                        productionEnvironment = null;
                        hasProductionEnabled = false;
                    }

                    // Update UI to reflect production state
                    if (elements.productionToggleCheckbox) {
                        elements.productionToggleCheckbox.checked = hasProductionEnabled;
                    }
                    if (hasProductionEnabled && elements.productionEnvironmentFields) {
                        elements.productionEnvironmentFields.style.display = 'block';
                        if (productionEnvironment && elements.productionNameInput) {
                            elements.productionNameInput.value = productionEnvironment.name || '';
                            elements.productionFunctionInput.value = productionEnvironment.identifier || '';
                            elements.productionDescriptionInput.value = productionEnvironment.description || '';
                        }
                    } else if (elements.productionEnvironmentFields) {
                        elements.productionEnvironmentFields.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                }
                if (data.config !== undefined) {
                    configState = data.config;
                }

                // Set hasChanges state from host
                if (data.hasChanges !== undefined) {
                    hasChanges = data.hasChanges;
                }

                // Forward GitHub auth response to the GitHub module
                if (data.githubAuthResponse && window._myopGithubSetAuthResponse) {
                    window._myopGithubSetAuthResponse(data.githubAuthResponse);
                    return { success: true };
                }

                // Forward self-hosting data to the self-hosting module
                if (data.selfHostingConfig !== undefined || data.apiKeys !== undefined || data.newlyCreatedKey !== undefined || data.apiKeyRevoked !== undefined || data.fullSyncTriggered !== undefined || data.fullSyncError !== undefined || data.webhookLogs !== undefined || data.syncInProgress !== undefined || data.selfHostingLoading !== undefined || data.githubRepos !== undefined || data.githubConnected !== undefined || data.githubConnectError !== undefined || data.subscriptionPlan !== undefined || data.orgRole !== undefined) {
                    if (window._myopSelfHostingUpdate) {
                        window._myopSelfHostingUpdate(data);
                    }
                }

                renderEnvironments();
                updateSaveButtonState();
                return data;
            }
            // Getter: Return current state - merge production back into environments array
            const allEnvironments = [...environmentsState];
            if (hasProductionEnabled && productionEnvironment) {
                allEnvironments.push(productionEnvironment);
            }
            return {
                environments: allEnvironments,
                config: configState
            };
        };

        /**
         * myop_cta_handler - Bidirectional communication from Component to Host
         * Set by host to receive events from component
         *
         * Events sent:
         *   - 'save': { environments: [...], deletedEnvironments: [...] }
         *   - 'cancel': {}
         *   - 'environmentChange': { environments: [...] }
         *   - 'requestDeleteEnvironment': { id, name, isSaved }
         *   - 'validationError': { message }
         */
        window.myop_cta_handler = null; // Will be set by host

        // ==========================================
        // AUTO-INITIALIZE
        // ==========================================

        function init() {
            cacheElements();
            attachEventListeners();

            // Show loading state while waiting for data
            if (elements.segmentList) {
                elements.segmentList.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">
                        <div class="empty-state-text">Loading environments...</div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            // Initialized and ready, waiting for data
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
        } else {
            init();
        }

    })(); // End IIFE

    // ==========================================
    // GITHUB INTEGRATION FUNCTIONALITY
    // ==========================================
    (function() {
        // Private state
        let githubState = {
            isConnected: false,
            organization: null,
            repository: null,
            branch: null,
            token: null,
            repositories: [], // Available repositories from GitHub
            settings: {
                autoSync: true,
                prPreviews: false,
                statusChecks: true
            },
            hasChanges: false
        };

        // DOM cache
        let githubElements = {};

        function cacheGithubElements() {
            githubElements = {
                statusIndicator: document.querySelector('#github-status .status-indicator'),
                statusText: document.querySelector('#github-status .status-text'),
                notConnectedState: document.getElementById('github-not-connected'),
                connectedState: document.getElementById('github-connected'),
                settingsCard: document.getElementById('github-settings-card'),
                btnConnect: document.getElementById('btn-connect-github'),
                btnDisconnect: document.getElementById('btn-disconnect-github'),
                orgName: document.getElementById('github-org-name'),
                orgUrl: document.getElementById('github-org-url'),
                // Custom dropdown elements for repo
                repoDropdown: document.getElementById('github-repo-dropdown'),
                repoTrigger: document.getElementById('github-repo-trigger'),
                repoValue: document.getElementById('github-repo-value'),
                repoMenu: document.getElementById('github-repo-menu'),
                repoSelect: document.getElementById('github-repo-select'), // hidden input
                // Custom dropdown elements for branch
                branchDropdown: document.getElementById('github-branch-dropdown'),
                branchTrigger: document.getElementById('github-branch-trigger'),
                branchValue: document.getElementById('github-branch-value'),
                branchMenu: document.getElementById('github-branch-menu'),
                branchSelect: document.getElementById('github-branch-select'), // hidden input
                // Settings
                autoSyncToggle: document.getElementById('github-auto-sync'),
                prPreviewsToggle: document.getElementById('github-pr-previews'),
                statusChecksToggle: document.getElementById('github-status-checks'),
                btnSave: document.getElementById('btn-github-save'),
                btnCancel: document.getElementById('btn-github-cancel')
            };
        }

        function updateGithubUI() {
            if (githubState.isConnected) {
                // Show connected state
                githubElements.statusIndicator.classList.remove('disconnected');
                githubElements.statusIndicator.classList.add('connected');
                githubElements.statusText.textContent = 'Connected';
                githubElements.notConnectedState.classList.add('hidden');
                githubElements.connectedState.classList.remove('hidden');
                githubElements.settingsCard.classList.remove('hidden');

                // Update org info
                if (githubState.organization) {
                    githubElements.orgName.textContent = githubState.organization.name;
                    githubElements.orgUrl.textContent = `github.com/${githubState.organization.name}`;
                }

                // Update repo selection (custom dropdown)
                if (githubState.repository) {
                    githubElements.repoSelect.value = githubState.repository;
                    githubElements.repoValue.textContent = githubState.repository;
                    githubElements.repoValue.classList.remove('placeholder');
                    // Enable branch dropdown
                    githubElements.branchTrigger.classList.remove('disabled');
                }

                // Update branch selection (custom dropdown)
                if (githubState.branch) {
                    githubElements.branchSelect.value = githubState.branch;
                    githubElements.branchValue.textContent = githubState.branch;
                    githubElements.branchValue.classList.remove('placeholder');
                }

                // Update settings toggles
                githubElements.autoSyncToggle.checked = githubState.settings.autoSync;
                githubElements.prPreviewsToggle.checked = githubState.settings.prPreviews;
                githubElements.statusChecksToggle.checked = githubState.settings.statusChecks;
            } else {
                // Show disconnected state
                githubElements.statusIndicator.classList.remove('connected');
                githubElements.statusIndicator.classList.add('disconnected');
                githubElements.statusText.textContent = 'Not Connected';
                githubElements.notConnectedState.classList.remove('hidden');
                githubElements.connectedState.classList.add('hidden');
                githubElements.settingsCard.classList.add('hidden');
            }

            updateGithubSaveButton();
        }

        function updateGithubSaveButton() {
            githubElements.btnSave.disabled = !githubState.hasChanges;
        }

        function handleConnect() {
            // Initiating GitHub connection

            // Notify host to open GitHub OAuth popup
            // The host will call _myopGithubSetAuthResponse when auth completes
            if (window.myop_cta_handler) {
                window.myop_cta_handler('github-connect-requested', {});
            }
        }

        /**
         * Called by host (via myop_init_interface) when GitHub auth completes
         * @param {Object} authResponse - { token: string, repositories: [{name, owner: {login}}] }
         */
        function setGithubAuthResponse(authResponse) {
            // Auth response received

            if (!authResponse || !authResponse.repositories) {
                console.error('GitHub: Invalid auth response');
                return;
            }

            // Extract organization/user name from first repo owner
            const firstRepo = authResponse.repositories[0];
            const orgName = firstRepo?.owner?.login || 'Unknown';

            // Update state
            githubState.isConnected = true;
            githubState.organization = {
                name: orgName,
                avatarUrl: `https://github.com/${orgName}.png`
            };
            githubState.token = authResponse.token;
            githubState.repositories = authResponse.repositories;
            githubState.hasChanges = true;

            // Populate repository dropdown with real repositories
            populateRepositoryDropdown(authResponse.repositories);

            // Update UI
            updateGithubUI();
        }

        function populateRepositoryDropdown(repositories) {
            const repoMenu = githubElements.repoMenu;
            if (!repoMenu) return;

            // Clear existing options
            repoMenu.innerHTML = '';

            if (repositories.length === 0) {
                repoMenu.innerHTML = '<div class="custom-dropdown-empty">No repositories available</div>';
                return;
            }

            // Add repository options
            repositories.forEach(repo => {
                const repoName = `${repo.owner.login}/${repo.name}`;
                const option = document.createElement('div');
                option.className = 'custom-dropdown-option';
                option.setAttribute('data-value', repoName);
                option.innerHTML = `
                    <span class="custom-dropdown-option-icon">
                        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path d="M3 7C3 5.89543 3.89543 5 5 5H19C20.1046 5 21 5.89543 21 7V17C21 18.1046 20.1046 19 19 19H5C3.89543 19 3 18.1046 3 17V7Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
                            <path d="M3 10H21" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
                            <path d="M7 15H12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                        </svg>
                    </span>
                    ${repoName}
                `;
                option.addEventListener('click', () => selectRepoOption(repoName));
                repoMenu.appendChild(option);
            });

            // Repository dropdown populated
        }

        function selectRepoOption(value) {
            githubState.repository = value || null;
            githubState.hasChanges = true;

            // Update hidden input and display value
            githubElements.repoSelect.value = value;
            githubElements.repoValue.textContent = value || 'Select a repository...';
            githubElements.repoValue.classList.toggle('placeholder', !value);

            // Update selected state in menu
            githubElements.repoMenu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.getAttribute('data-value') === value);
            });

            // Close dropdown
            closeAllDropdowns();

            // Enable/disable branch select based on repo selection
            if (value) {
                githubElements.branchTrigger.classList.remove('disabled');
            } else {
                githubElements.branchTrigger.classList.add('disabled');
                githubState.branch = null;
                githubElements.branchSelect.value = '';
                githubElements.branchValue.textContent = 'Select a branch...';
                githubElements.branchValue.classList.add('placeholder');
            }

            updateGithubSaveButton();

            // Notify host
            if (window.myop_cta_handler) {
                window.myop_cta_handler('github-repo-changed', { repository: value });
            }
        }

        function selectBranchOption(value) {
            githubState.branch = value || null;
            githubState.hasChanges = true;

            // Update hidden input and display value
            githubElements.branchSelect.value = value;
            githubElements.branchValue.textContent = value || 'Select a branch...';
            githubElements.branchValue.classList.toggle('placeholder', !value);

            // Update selected state in menu
            githubElements.branchMenu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.getAttribute('data-value') === value);
            });

            // Close dropdown
            closeAllDropdowns();

            updateGithubSaveButton();

            // Notify host
            if (window.myop_cta_handler) {
                window.myop_cta_handler('github-branch-changed', { branch: value });
            }
        }

        // Track focused index for keyboard navigation
        let focusedOptionIndex = -1;
        let activeMenu = null;

        function toggleDropdown(dropdown, trigger, menu) {
            const isOpen = menu.classList.contains('open');

            // Close all other dropdowns first
            closeAllDropdowns();

            if (!isOpen && !trigger.classList.contains('disabled')) {
                // Position the menu based on trigger's position
                const rect = trigger.getBoundingClientRect();
                menu.style.top = (rect.bottom + 4) + 'px';
                menu.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                menu.style.width = rect.width + 'px';

                menu.classList.add('open');
                trigger.classList.add('active');
                trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                activeMenu = menu;
                focusedOptionIndex = -1;

                // Clear any previous focused state
                menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option.focused').forEach(opt => {
                    opt.classList.remove('focused');
                });
            }
        }

        function closeAllDropdowns() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-menu.open').forEach(menu => {
                menu.classList.remove('open');
                menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option.focused').forEach(opt => {
                    opt.classList.remove('focused');
                });
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-trigger.active').forEach(trigger => {
                trigger.classList.remove('active');
                trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            });
            activeMenu = null;
            focusedOptionIndex = -1;
        }

        function handleDropdownKeydown(e, trigger, menu, selectFn) {
            const options = menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option');
            if (options.length === 0) return;

            const isOpen = menu.classList.contains('open');

            switch (e.key) {
                case 'Enter':
                case ' ':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (!isOpen) {
                        toggleDropdown(null, trigger, menu);
                    } else if (focusedOptionIndex >= 0 && options[focusedOptionIndex]) {
                        const value = options[focusedOptionIndex].getAttribute('data-value');
                        selectFn(value);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'Escape':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                    trigger.focus();
                    break;

                case 'ArrowDown':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (!isOpen) {
                        toggleDropdown(null, trigger, menu);
                    } else {
                        // Move focus down
                        options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('focused'));
                        focusedOptionIndex = Math.min(focusedOptionIndex + 1, options.length - 1);
                        options[focusedOptionIndex].classList.add('focused');
                        options[focusedOptionIndex].scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' });
                    }
                    break;

                case 'ArrowUp':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (isOpen) {
                        // Move focus up
                        options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('focused'));
                        focusedOptionIndex = Math.max(focusedOptionIndex - 1, 0);
                        options[focusedOptionIndex].classList.add('focused');
                        options[focusedOptionIndex].scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' });
                    }
                    break;

                case 'Tab':
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                    break;

                case 'Home':
                    if (isOpen) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('focused'));
                        focusedOptionIndex = 0;
                        options[focusedOptionIndex].classList.add('focused');
                        options[focusedOptionIndex].scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' });
                    }
                    break;

                case 'End':
                    if (isOpen) {

            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            const now = new Date();
            const diffMs = now - d;
            const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
            if (diffMins < 1) return 'just now';
            if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins}m ago`;
            const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMins / 60);
            if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours}h ago`;
            const diffDays = Math.floor(diffHours / 24);
            return `${diffDays}d ago`;

        const SELF_HOSTING_PLANS = ['scale', 'unlimited', 'enterprise'];
        let _shAccessState = { plan: null, role: null };

        function updateSelfHostingTabAccess() {
            const shTabItem = document.querySelector('.tab-item[data-tab="selfhosting"]');
            if (!shTabItem) return;
            // Both conditions must pass: qualifying plan AND admin role
            const planOk = SELF_HOSTING_PLANS.includes(_shAccessState.plan);
            const roleOk = _shAccessState.role === 'admin';
            const allowed = planOk && roleOk;

            // Determine tooltip message
            let tooltipMsg = 'Available on Scale plan and above';
            if (planOk && !roleOk) {
                tooltipMsg = 'Only organization admins can access this';
            } else if (!planOk && roleOk) {
                tooltipMsg = 'Available on Scale plan and above';
            } else if (!planOk && !roleOk) {
                tooltipMsg = 'Available for admins on Scale plan and above';
            }

            if (allowed) {
                shTabItem.classList.remove('disabled');
                // Remove tooltip wrapper if present
                if (shTabItem.parentElement?.classList.contains('tab-item-wrapper')) {
                    const wrapper = shTabItem.parentElement;
                    wrapper.parentElement.insertBefore(shTabItem, wrapper);
                    wrapper.remove();
                }
            } else {
                shTabItem.classList.add('disabled');
                // Wrap with tooltip if not already
                if (!shTabItem.parentElement?.classList.contains('tab-item-wrapper')) {
                    const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
                    wrapper.className = 'tab-item-wrapper';
                    const tooltip = document.createElement('span');
                    tooltip.className = 'tab-tooltip';
                    tooltip.textContent = tooltipMsg;
                    shTabItem.parentElement.insertBefore(wrapper, shTabItem);
                    wrapper.appendChild(shTabItem);
                    wrapper.appendChild(tooltip);
                } else {
                    // Update existing tooltip text
                    const tooltip = shTabItem.parentElement.querySelector('.tab-tooltip');
                    if (tooltip) tooltip.textContent = tooltipMsg;
                }
            }
        }

        // Expose a function for myop_init_interface to call
        window._myopSelfHostingUpdate = function(data) {
            if (data.subscriptionPlan !== undefined || data.orgRole !== undefined) {
                if (data.subscriptionPlan !== undefined) _shAccessState.plan = data.subscriptionPlan;
                if (data.orgRole !== undefined) _shAccessState.role = data.orgRole;
                updateSelfHostingTabAccess();
            }
            // Loading overlay — blocks clicks during async operations
            if (data.selfHostingLoading !== undefined) {
                const shTab = document.getElementById('sh-tab-content') || document.querySelector('.sh-content');
                if (shTab) {
                    let overlay = document.getElementById('sh-loading-overlay');
                    if (data.selfHostingLoading) {
                        if (!overlay) {
                            overlay = document.createElement('div');
                            overlay.id = 'sh-loading-overlay';
                            overlay.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10;pointer-events:all;';
                            overlay.innerHTML = '<span class="sh-spinner" style="width:24px;height:24px;"></span>';
                            shTab.style.position = 'relative';
                            shTab.appendChild(overlay);
                        }
                    } else if (overlay) {
                        overlay.remove();
                    }
                }
            }
            if (data.selfHostingConfig !== undefined && data.selfHostingConfig) {
                shState.syncEnabled = data.selfHostingConfig.syncEnabled || false;
                shState.webhooks = data.selfHostingConfig.webhooks || [];
                // Server returns newWebhookSecrets for newly created generic webhooks
                if (data.selfHostingConfig.newWebhookSecrets && data.selfHostingConfig.newWebhookSecrets.length > 0) {
                    const ns = data.selfHostingConfig.newWebhookSecrets[0];
                    shState._newlyCreatedSecret = { url: ns.url, secret: ns.secret };
                }
            }
            if (data.apiKeys !== undefined) {
                shState.apiKeys = data.apiKeys || [];
            }
            if (data.newlyCreatedKey !== undefined && data.newlyCreatedKey) {
                shState.newlyCreatedKey = data.newlyCreatedKey;
                // Also add to list if not already present
                if (!shState.apiKeys.find(k => k.id === data.newlyCreatedKey.id)) {
                    shState.apiKeys.unshift(data.newlyCreatedKey);
                }
            }
            if (data.apiKeyRevoked !== undefined) {
                shState.apiKeys = shState.apiKeys.filter(k => k.id !== data.apiKeyRevoked);
                if (shState.newlyCreatedKey && shState.newlyCreatedKey.id === data.apiKeyRevoked) {
                    shState.newlyCreatedKey = null;
                }
            }
            if (data.webhookLogs !== undefined) {
                shState.webhookLogs = data.webhookLogs || [];
            }
            if (data.syncInProgress !== undefined) {
                shState.syncInProgress = data.syncInProgress;
                const statusEl = document.getElementById('sh-sync-status');
                const btn = document.getElementById('sh-btn-full-sync');
                if (data.syncInProgress) {
                    if (statusEl) {
                        statusEl.style.display = 'block';
                        statusEl.style.background = 'var(--panel-bg, #f9fafb)';
                        statusEl.style.color = 'var(--text-color)';
                        statusEl.innerHTML = '<span class="sh-spinner"></span>Sending webhooks...';
                    }
                    if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Syncing...'; }
                }
            }
            if (data.fullSyncTriggered !== undefined) {
                const statusEl = document.getElementById('sh-sync-status');
                const btn = document.getElementById('sh-btn-full-sync');
                const results = data.fullSyncTriggered.deliveryResults || [];
                const allOk = results.length > 0 && results.every(r => r.success);
                const allFailed = results.length > 0 && results.every(r => !r.success);

                if (statusEl) {
                    statusEl.style.display = 'block';
                    if (results.length === 0) {
                        statusEl.className = 'sh-sync-result success';
                        statusEl.textContent = `Sync triggered for ${data.fullSyncTriggered.releaseCount} release(s). Your webhooks have been notified.`;
                    } else if (allOk) {
                        statusEl.className = 'sh-sync-result success';
                        statusEl.innerHTML = `Sync complete — ${data.fullSyncTriggered.releaseCount} release(s) sent to ${results.length} webhook(s). All delivered successfully.`;
                    } else if (allFailed) {
                        statusEl.className = 'sh-sync-result failure';
                        statusEl.innerHTML = `Sync failed — ${results.length} webhook(s) could not be reached.<br>${results.map(r => '<span style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;">' + escapeHtml(r.webhookUrl) + ': ' + escapeHtml(r.error || 'Unknown error') + '</span>').join('<br>')}`;
                    } else {
                        statusEl.className = 'sh-sync-result mixed';
                        const ok = results.filter(r => r.success).length;
                        const fail = results.filter(r => !r.success).length;
                        statusEl.innerHTML = `Sync partially complete — ${ok} webhook(s) succeeded, ${fail} failed.<br>${results.filter(r => !r.success).map(r => '<span style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;">' + escapeHtml(r.webhookUrl) + ': ' + escapeHtml(r.error || 'Unknown error') + '</span>').join('<br>')}`;
                    }
                }
                if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Sync Now'; }
            }
            if (data.fullSyncError !== undefined) {
                const statusEl = document.getElementById('sh-sync-status');
                const btn = document.getElementById('sh-btn-full-sync');
                if (statusEl) {
                    statusEl.style.display = 'block';
                    statusEl.className = 'sh-sync-result failure';
                    statusEl.textContent = `Sync failed: ${data.fullSyncError}`;
                }
                if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Sync Now'; }
            }
            // GitHub OAuth returned repos — show repo selector
            if (data.githubRepos !== undefined && data.githubToken) {
                shState._githubToken = data.githubToken;
                const selectEl = shElements.githubRepoList;
                const containerEl = shElements.githubRepoSelect;
                if (selectEl && containerEl) {
                    selectEl.innerHTML = data.githubRepos.map(r =>
                        `<option value="${escapeHtml(r.name)}">${escapeHtml(r.name)}</option>`
                    ).join('');
                    containerEl.style.display = 'block';
                }
            }
            // GitHub repo selected and installationId resolved — add as webhook
            if (data.githubConnected !== undefined) {
                const { repo, installationId } = data.githubConnected;
                // Don't add duplicate
                if (!shState.webhooks.find(w => w.type === 'github' && w.repo === repo)) {
                    shState.webhooks.push({ type: 'github', repo, installationId });
                    shState.hasChanges = true;
                }
                shState._githubToken = null;
                if (shElements.githubRepoSelect) shElements.githubRepoSelect.style.display = 'none';
                renderWebhooks();
            }
            if (data.githubConnectError !== undefined) {
                shState._githubToken = null;
                if (shElements.githubRepoSelect) shElements.githubRepoSelect.style.display = 'none';
                // Show inline error instead of browser alert
                const statusEl = document.getElementById('sh-sync-status');
                if (statusEl) {
                    statusEl.style.display = 'block';
                    statusEl.className = 'sh-sync-result failure';
                    statusEl.textContent = data.githubConnectError;
                }
            }
            updateSHUI();
        };

        function initSelfHosting() {
            cacheSHElements();
            attachSHEventListeners();
            updateSHUI();
            // Self-hosting tab initialized
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSelfHosting);
        } else {
            initSelfHosting();
        }
    })(); // End Self-Hosting IIFE
</script>
</body>

</html>
